desc:
Increases the wearer's SPD by #1[i]%. When the wearer enters combat or uses Ultimate on an ally target, the wearer gains "Great Fortune" for #4[i] turn(s). While the wearer holds "Great Fortune," all allies' CRIT Rate increases by #2[i]%, CRIT DMG increases by #3[i]%, and the wearer's Energy Regeneration Rate increases by #5[i]%.
At the start of each wave, the wearer regenerates a fixed amount of #6[i] Energy.
